title: sericocalyx fluviatilis
intro: Sericocalyx fluviatilis, also known as the water mint or water mint bush, is a plant species that belongs to the family Lamiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which are known for their anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Sericocalyx fluviatilis include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and providing antimicrobial protection. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
